pages.description: Warrantee.io is warranty management software to track, approve, extend, verify, and claim warranties in one place. Bilingual Arabic and English. Free plan available.
pages.markdown:
---
title: "Warrantee.io — Warranty Management Software & Platform"
description: "Warrantee.io is warranty management software to track, approve, extend, verify, and claim warranties in one place. Bilingual Arabic and English. Free plan available."
canonical: "https://warrantee.io/en"
language: "en"
content_location: "https://warrantee.io/agent-markdown/en.md"
---

# Trust the Terms. Track Every Warranty.

Warrantee is the warranty management platform built for businesses. Approve, track, and claim warranties with confidence.

[Get Started Free](https://warrantee.io/en/auth?tab=signup)[Request a Demo](https://warrantee.io/en#contact)

No credit card required. Free plan available.

## Warranties shouldn’t be this hard.

Managing warranties across your organization is complex. Track them with clarity and confidence.

### Missing Deadlines

Forget expiration dates and lose coverage when you need it most.

### Manual Approvals

Back-and-forth emails and spreadsheets slow down your team.

### Unverified Claims

Lack of audit trails and documentation lead to disputes.

### Language Barriers

Managing warranties across Arabic and English adds translation overhead.

## Everything You Need

All the tools you need to manage warranties at scale.

### Smart Approval Workflow

Set custom approval rules, route warranties to the right teams, and automate multi-level approvals.

### Expiry Reminders

Never miss a warranty deadline. Get proactive alerts for upcoming expirations and critical dates.

### Bilingual Certificates

Generate professional warranty certificates in Arabic and English. Fully customizable with your branding.

### Real-Time Dashboard

View all warranties at a glance. Track status, expiration dates, and claim history in one central hub.

### Email-to-Warranty

Forward emails to create warranty records automatically. Supporting documents included instantly.

### Chain Tracking

Track warranty chains and transfers. Maintain complete audit trails of ownership and approvals.

Post-purchase trust loop

## Turn every warranty into a verified product passport.

Buyers scan once to confirm authenticity, open the certificate, file a claim, or request extension. Sellers keep the relationship alive after the sale.

[Start issuing warranties](https://warrantee.io/en/seller/register)[View API / CLI / MCP](https://warrantee.io/en/api-docs)[View sample passport](https://warrantee.io/en/demo/product-passport)

### Scannable verification

Each certificate and warranty page points to a live verification record instead of a static PDF.

### Claims and extension path

The same passport routes buyers into claims and extension requests with the right context already attached.

### API / CLI / MCP-ready for operations

Registered users can connect ERP, ecommerce, support workflows, scripts, and agents through scoped, rate-limited integration tokens.

Verified proof at point of service

Extension demand becomes revenue signal

Support teams see fewer blind disputes

Operational proof

## Built for proof, not just storage.

Every warranty needs an owner, evidence, terms, and a verification path. Warrantee keeps those pieces connected from issue to claim.

### Security boundaries

Protected dashboards, authenticated API / CLI / MCP access, and company-aware permissions.

### Audit-ready records

Approvals, claims, documents, and status changes stay tied to the warranty.

### Certificate proof

Bilingual certificates and QR verification help buyers and service teams trust the record.

### API / CLI / MCP controls

Scoped tokens, rate limits, and ownership checks protect integration access.

## How Warrantee Works

Get started in minutes with our intuitive workflow.

1

### Register Your Company

Sign up and set up your company profile in minutes.

2

### Create Warranties

Add warranties manually or via email. Attach documents automatically.

3

### Approve & Track

Route to approvers, collect signatures, and activate warranties.

4

### Monitor & Claim

Track status in real-time and process claims with full documentation.

## Never Lose Coverage Again

Extend warranties before expiration. Sellers offer extensions directly through Warrantee, and buyers purchase them instantly.

-   Flexible extension terms
-   Instant approval process
-   Transparent pricing

Seller

Extension Offer

Buyer

Extended Coverage

## Simple, Transparent Pricing

Start with the Free plan. Upgrade when you need more workflow depth.

### Free

For individuals getting started

$0/ month

[Get Started Free](https://warrantee.io/en/auth?tab=signup)

-   Up to 10 warranties
-   Basic dashboard
-   Email support
-   Single user
-   Full warranty history

Launch offer in SAR

### Professional

Saudi-first launch offer for growing businesses.

SAR 149/ month

[Start Professional](https://warrantee.io/en/auth?tab=signup)

-   Unlimited warranties
-   Advanced dashboard & analytics
-   Priority email & chat support
-   Up to 5 team members
-   Full warranty history
-   Custom approval workflows
-   Bilingual certificates

### Enterprise

For large organizations

Custom

[Contact Sales](https://warrantee.io/en/auth?tab=signup)

-   Everything in Professional
-   Unlimited team members
-   Dedicated account manager
-   Custom integrations
-   Advanced security & SSO
-   Unlimited history
-   SLA guarantee
-   Negotiable commission rate

## Ready to protect what matters?

Start your free account today. No credit card required.

[Get Started](https://warrantee.io/en/auth?tab=signup)[hello@warrantee.io](mailto:hello@warrantee.io)

pages.description: Learn how Warrantee is transforming warranty management for businesses across Saudi Arabia and the GCC.
pages.markdown:
---
title: "About Warrantee — Our Story"
description: "Learn how Warrantee is transforming warranty management for businesses across Saudi Arabia and the GCC."
canonical: "https://warrantee.io/en/about"
language: "en"
content_location: "https://warrantee.io/agent-markdown/en/about.md"
---

# Our Story

How a forgotten warranty receipt turned into a mission to protect every purchase you'll ever make.

## It Started with a Broken AC

In the summer of 2024, our founder's office air conditioning unit failed. It was less than two years old, well within the warranty period. But when he went to file a claim, the receipt was gone. The supplier email was buried in an old thread. The result: SAR 4,500 out of pocket for a repair that should have been free.

That was not the first time. A laptop with a dead screen had a warranty that expired two weeks before anyone noticed. A water heater failed while the installer warranty was still valid, but nobody could find the paperwork.

> “I realized I was not alone. Every person, every business, every facility manager I talked to had the same problem. Warranties exist to protect us, but we had built no system to manage them.”

## The Mission

Warrantee was founded with a simple mission: no one should lose money because they forgot about a warranty. We built a platform that does for warranties what your bank does for your money: keeps track of everything in one place, reminds you when action is needed, and gives you the tools to act.

## Our Values

### Transparency

Warranty terms should be clear, accessible, and easy to understand. We make the fine print visible.

### Trust

Trust the Terms is not just a tagline. Every feature we build creates accountability between buyers and sellers.

### Bilingual by Default

Arabic and English are equal first-class citizens in every feature and every screen.

### Simplicity

Warranty management should not require training. If it is not obvious, we keep improving it.

## Join Us

Start protecting your warranties today. It takes 60 seconds to sign up, and it is free.

[Get Started Free](https://warrantee.io/en/auth?tab=signup)

---
title: "Warrantee Blog — Warranty Management Guides"
description: "Practical guides on warranty management software, warranty tracking, claims workflows, extensions, and bilingual warranty operations."
canonical: "https://warrantee.io/en/blog"
language: "en"

---

Warrantee resources

# Warranty management guides for teams that need proof, speed, and trust.

Use this hub to understand warranty tracking, claim workflows, document evidence, seller onboarding, and API / CLI / MCP-ready warranty operations.

Warranty operations

## How to manage warranties without spreadsheets

A practical operating model for moving warranty records, receipts, claims, and expiry reminders out of inboxes and into a single auditable system.

[Read related guide](https://warrantee.io/en/guide)

Buyer guide

## What to look for in warranty management software

The core capabilities sellers and buyers need: OCR capture, approval workflows, claim tracking, bilingual certificates, reminders, and API / CLI / MCP-ready integrations.

[Read related guide](https://warrantee.io/en/features)

Claims workflow

## Warranty claims management: from proof to resolution

How clean evidence, document provenance, seller status, and approval history reduce disputes and make warranty decisions easier to trust.

[Read related guide](https://warrantee.io/en/faq)

Authority guides

## Topics buyers and teams search before choosing a warranty platform.

### Warranty Management Software for Businesses

Learn how warranty management software helps teams register warranties, track expiry, manage claims, issue certificates, and keep audit-ready records.

[Read guide](https://warrantee.io/en/resources/warranty-management-software)

### Warranty Claims Management

A practical guide to warranty claims management: evidence, claim intake, seller review, decisions, status tracking, and customer communication.

[Read guide](https://warrantee.io/en/resources/warranty-claims-management)

### Digital Warranty Certificates

How digital warranty certificates improve proof, verification, QR access, bilingual support, and customer trust after purchase.

[Read guide](https://warrantee.io/en/resources/digital-warranty-certificates)

### ERP Warranty API / CLI / MCP Integration

How ERP, ecommerce, scripts, and agents can connect to warranty workflows using scoped integration tokens, verified users, and controlled rate limits.

[Read guide](https://warrantee.io/en/resources/erp-warranty-api-integration)

### Saudi and GCC Warranty Operations

Warranty operations guidance for Saudi Arabia and GCC businesses that need Arabic and English records, seller workflows, proof, and customer trust.

[Read guide](https://warrantee.io/en/resources/saudi-gcc-warranty-operations)

### Product Passport and Warranty Verification

How public warranty verification and product-passport records help buyers, sellers, and service teams trust warranty status without exposing private account data.

[Read guide](https://warrantee.io/en/resources/product-passport-warranty-verification)

### Warranty Extension Marketplace Readiness

What businesses need before offering warranty extensions: eligibility rules, payments, audit trails, claim history, underwriting signals, and customer trust.

[Read guide](https://warrantee.io/en/resources/warranty-extension-marketplace)

### Recall and Asset Lifecycle Intelligence

How warranty records can evolve into asset lifecycle intelligence for recalls, vendor reliability, product risk, claim patterns, and renewal opportunities.

[Read guide](https://warrantee.io/en/resources/recall-asset-lifecycle-intelligence)

Decision comparisons

### Warrantee vs Spreadsheets

Compare Warrantee with spreadsheet-based warranty tracking for proof, permissions, reminders, claims, certificates, and API / CLI / MCP integration.

[Compare options](https://warrantee.io/en/compare/spreadsheets)

### Why Not Build Warranty Software With AI?

A practical comparison between building a custom AI-generated warranty tool and using Warrantee for production-ready warranty workflows.

[Compare options](https://warrantee.io/en/compare/build-with-ai)

title: "Warrantee Features — Smart Warranty Tools"

# Platform Features

Everything businesses and sellers need to manage warranties efficiently in Saudi Arabia and the GCC

### Digital Warranty Certificates

Issue professional, tamper-proof warranty certificates with QR verification codes.

### Claims Management

Streamlined warranty claims workflow from submission to resolution.

### Advanced Analytics

Real-time dashboards with warranty performance metrics and insights.

### Team Collaboration

Invite team members with role-based access controls.

### Bilingual Support

Full Arabic and English interface with RTL layout support.

### Email Ingestion

Automatically create warranties from forwarded emails using AI.

### Enterprise Security

Row-level security, encrypted data, and role-based permissions.

### Expiry Tracking

Automatic notifications before warranty expiration dates.

## Start Free Today

Create your free account and start managing warranties in minutes

[Get Started](https://warrantee.io/en/auth?tab=signup)

---
title: "Warrantee Pricing — Simple and Transparent Plans"
description: "Start with a Free plan, no credit card required, or upgrade to the Professional launch offer at SAR 149/month. Enterprise warranty management pricing is custom."
canonical: "https://warrantee.io/en/pricing"
language: "en"
content_location: "https://warrantee.io/agent-markdown/en/pricing.md"
---

# Choose Your Plan

Start with a Free plan, no card required, or unlock the Professional launch offer in SAR

Free includes up to 10 warranties with records retained. Extension purchases carry a separate transaction fee.

### Free

For individuals getting started

Free

-   Up to 10 warranties
-   Basic dashboard
-   Email support
-   Single user
-   Full warranty history

Most Popular

### Professional

For growing businesses

SAR 149 /month

Launch offer

-   Unlimited warranties
-   Advanced analytics
-   Priority support
-   Up to 5 team members
-   Full warranty history
-   Custom workflows
-   Bilingual certificates

### Enterprise

For large organizations

Contact Us

-   Everything in Professional
-   Unlimited team members
-   Dedicated account manager
-   Custom integrations
-   SLA guarantee

Pricing clarity

## Why a SAR Professional launch price?

The Professional price is a clear early-customer launch offer for Saudi and GCC customers. Free-plan limits are explicit, and warranty-extension transaction fees are separated from subscription benefits so cost never reads like a feature.

### No card for Free

Start with up to 10 warranties without entering a card.

### Clear SAR pricing

Professional terms are stated before checkout.

### Team ready

Built for sellers, approvals, and certificates.

### Integration ready

API / CLI / MCP guide is available for business users.

Have questions? [Contact us](https://warrantee.io/en/contact)

pages.description: Find answers to common questions about Warrantee's warranty management platform.
pages.markdown:
---
title: "FAQ — Warrantee Frequently Asked Questions"
description: "Find answers to common questions about Warrantee's warranty management platform."
canonical: "https://warrantee.io/en/faq"
language: "en"
content_location: "https://warrantee.io/agent-markdown/en/faq.md"
---

# Frequently Asked Questions

Answers to the most common questions about Warrantee

<details>
<summary>What is Warrantee?\\u25BC</summary>

Warrantee.io is a bilingual warranty management platform for businesses and sellers in Saudi Arabia and the GCC. It helps teams track, extend, verify, and manage warranty claims digitally.
</details>

<details>
<summary>How much does Warrantee cost?\\u25BC</summary>

Warrantee.io offers a Free plan with no credit card required, a Professional launch offer at SAR 149/month, and Enterprise plans with custom pricing. Warranty-extension transaction fees are separate.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Is Warrantee available in Arabic?\\u25BC</summary>

Yes! Warrantee is fully bilingual, supporting both English and Arabic with complete RTL (right-to-left) layout support.
</details>

<details>
<summary>How do I add a warranty?\\u25BC</summary>

After signing up and logging into your dashboard, click 'Add Warranty' and fill in the product details, supplier information, start date, and duration. You can also forward warranty emails to your Warrantee inbox for automatic extraction.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Can I import warranties via email?\\u25BC</summary>

Yes. Warrantee supports email ingestion — forward warranty confirmations to your dedicated inbox address, and our system will automatically extract warranty details using AI.
</details>

<details>
<summary>How do I file a warranty claim?\\u25BC</summary>

Navigate to the warranty in your dashboard, click 'File Claim', describe the issue, and attach any supporting photos or documents. The claim will be tracked through resolution.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Is my data secure?\\u25BC</summary>

Absolutely. Warrantee uses Supabase with Row Level Security (RLS), ensuring your data is isolated and protected. All connections are encrypted with TLS, and we enforce strict security headers.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Can I invite my team?\\u25BC</summary>

Yes. On the Professional and Enterprise plans, you can invite team members as sellers or administrators to collaborate on warranty management.
</details>

<details>
<summary>What happens when a warranty is about to expire?\\u25BC</summary>

Warrantee sends automated notifications before warranties expire, giving you time to file claims or request extensions.
</details>

<details>
<summary>How do I contact support?\\u25BC</summary>

Visit our Contact page or email us at support@warrantee.io. Enterprise customers have access to priority support.
</details>

Didn’t find your answer?

[Contact Us](https://warrantee.io/en/contact)

pages.description: Step-by-step guide to using Warrantee: set up your account, create warranties, and manage approvals.
pages.markdown:
---
title: "Warrantee User Guide — Getting Started"
description: "Step-by-step guide to using Warrantee: set up your account, create warranties, and manage approvals."
canonical: "https://warrantee.io/en/guide"
language: "en"
content_location: "https://warrantee.io/agent-markdown/en/guide.md"
---

# Getting Started Guide

Learn how to manage your warranties effectively in 4 simple steps

Step 1

### Add Your First Warranty

Upload a photo or enter details manually. Smart Scan auto-fills fields for you.

Step 2

### Track Status

Monitor active, expiring, and expired warranties at a glance.

Step 3

### Get Notified

Receive alerts before warranties expire so you never miss a claim.

Step 4

### File a Claim

Submit a warranty claim in one click and track its progress.

## Frequently Asked Questions

<details>
<summary>How do I add a new warranty?</summary>

Go to Warranties > New and upload a photo or enter details manually. Smart Scan will auto-fill fields from your receipt.
</details>

<details>
<summary>What is Smart Scan?</summary>

Smart Scan uses OCR technology to read receipts and warranty documents, automatically extracting product details, dates, and seller info.
</details>

<details>
<summary>How do I file a warranty claim?</summary>

Open the warranty > Click File Claim > Describe the issue and attach photos. We will notify the seller and track the process.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Can I share a warranty?</summary>

Yes! You can share the warranty certificate via a link or download it as a PDF.
</details>

## Ready to get started?

Add your first warranty now and start protecting your purchases

Add Warranty

pages.description: Connect Warrantee to ERP, ecommerce, scripts, and agents through warranty APIs, CLI examples, MCP discovery, and scoped server integration tokens.
pages.markdown:
---
title: "Warrantee API / CLI / MCP Guide — ERP & System Integrations"
description: "Connect Warrantee to ERP, ecommerce, scripts, and agents through warranty APIs, CLI examples, MCP discovery, and scoped server integration tokens."
canonical: "https://warrantee.io/en/api-docs"
language: "en"
content_location: "https://warrantee.io/agent-markdown/en/api-docs.md"
---

[Back to Home](https://warrantee.io/en)

# API / CLI / MCP Guide

Connect Warrantee with ERP, ecommerce, scripts, internal systems, and agent workflows

[Sign in to generate a key](https://warrantee.io/en/auth?redirect=%2Fen%2Fsettings%3Fsection%3Dintegrations)[Onboard as seller](https://warrantee.io/en/seller/register)

### Complete integration guide

Every production integration starts from a logged-in Warrantee account. Generate a scoped token in Settings, store it as a secret, then use it from REST API calls, CLI scripts, or MCP-aware agents.

1.  1Sign in or create a Warrantee account.
2.  2Open Settings > API / CLI / MCP.
3.  3Generate a scoped integration token and copy it once.
4.  4Store it in a secret manager or environment variable.
5.  5Use the token as x-api-key for API, CLI, or agent requests.
6.  6Monitor usage, rotate keys, and revoke unused tokens.

### Base URL

`https://warrantee.io/api/v1`

### Authentication

API access is limited to registered Warrantee users. For ERP, ecommerce, or server-to-server integrations, do not store a Warrantee username or password in the external system. Sign in once to Warrantee, create a dedicated integration token, then send that token as x-api-key.

No shared usernames or passwords

The person setting up the integration signs into Warrantee only to create, view, revoke, or rotate integration tokens. Do not use your login email or password in API, CLI, or MCP integrations. The connected system should store only the generated server integration token, which can be scoped, rate-limited, expired, and revoked.

Recommended for server integrations

`x-api-key: YOUR_SERVER_INTEGRATION_TOKEN`

Signed-in app sessions

`Authorization: Bearer YOUR_SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN`

Rate Limiting: 100 requests per minute per signed-in user or integration token, plus IP-level abuse throttles.

### Security Model

Every warranty request is authenticated, scoped to the owner, seller, or issuer records of the resolved user, rate-limited, and returned with no-store cache headers.

Responses include X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset, Cache-Control: no-store, and Vary: Authorization, x-api-key.

### Integration Tokens

Create up to 20 active tokens from a signed-in session. Warrantee shows the secret once, stores only a hash, supports read/write scopes, expiry, last-used tracking, and revocation.

Create token

`POST /api/integration-tokens`

Revoke token

`DELETE /api/integration-tokens/:id`

`{ "name": "ERP production", "scopes": ["warranties:read", "warranties:write", "claims:read", "documents:read"], "rate_limit_per_minute": 100 }`

Scopes: warranties:read for warranty list/detail access, warranties:write for create/update/delete, claims:read for claim records, and documents:read for document metadata without private file URLs.

### Integration Notes

Use Idempotency-Key on create requests, keep a stable reference number when possible, and use scoped server-to-server integration tokens for ERP sync jobs. Never ask a client to send their Warrantee password to an integration partner.

`Idempotency-Key: 8f5d07d0-erp-order-102044`

### CLI and scripts

Use the official Warrantee CLI in shell scripts, ERP jobs, ecommerce syncs, and CI tasks. In this repo it runs through npm scripts; after package installation or npm link it can also run as warrantee. The token belongs to the signed-in Warrantee user and never requires storing a username or password.

Recommended environment variable

`export WARRANTEE_API_KEY="wrt_..."`

npm run warrantee:cli -- auth status
./tools/warrantee/cli.mjs auth status
warrantee auth status
npm run warrantee:cli -- warranties list --status active --pretty
npm run warrantee:cli -- claims list --status pending --pretty
npm run warrantee:cli -- documents list --query receipt --pretty
npm run warrantee:cli -- warranties create \\
  --product-name "Laptop" \\
  --start-date 2026-01-01 \\
  --end-date 2027-01-01 \\
  --idempotency-key erp-order-102044
npm run warrantee:cli -- verify WR-12345

### MCP and agent use

Run the Warrantee MCP server over stdio or call the hosted HTTP MCP endpoint at /api/mcp so agents can list, get, create, update, delete, and verify warranties; list claims; and read document metadata through the same scoped API key. In this repo use npm run warrantee:mcp; after package installation or npm link use warrantee-mcp. Agents must respect scopes, rate limits, ownership boundaries, and never ask users for passwords.

{
  "mcpServers": {
    "warrantee": {
      "command": "npm",
      "args": \[
        "run",
        "warrantee:mcp",
        "--"
      \],
      "env": {
        "WARRANTEE\_API\_KEY": "wrt\_..."
      }
    },
    "warrantee-installed": {
      "command": "warrantee-mcp",
      "env": {
        "WARRANTEE\_API\_KEY": "wrt\_..."
      }
    }
  }
}

curl -X POST "https://warrantee.io/api/mcp" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -H "x-api-key: YOUR\_SERVER\_INTEGRATION\_TOKEN" \\
  -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/list","params":{}}'

Agent rules

Use /llms.txt, /.well-known/agent-card.json, /.well-known/mcp.json, /.well-known/api-catalog, and /api/mcp for hosted MCP discovery. Use the public verify page for public checks. Use x-api-key only for authenticated account data.

### Endpoints

GET`/api/v1/warranties`List Warranties

Parameters: `page, limit, status, category`

POST`/api/v1/warranties`Create Warranty

Parameters: `product_name*, start_date*, end_date*, description, serial_number, category, supplier, seller_name, seller_email`

GET`/api/v1/warranties/:id`Get Warranty

Parameters: `id (path)`

PUT`/api/v1/warranties/:id`Update Warranty

Parameters: `product_name, start_date, end_date, status, category, supplier`

DELETE`/api/v1/warranties/:id`Delete Warranty

Parameters: `id (path)`

GET`/api/v1/claims`List Claims

Parameters: `page, limit, status, warranty_id`

GET`/api/v1/claims/:id`Get Claim

Parameters: `id (path)`

GET`/api/v1/documents`List Document Metadata

Parameters: `page, limit, warranty_id, q`

GET`/api/v1/documents/:id`Get Document Metadata

Parameters: `id (path)`

#### Example Request

curl -X GET "https://warrantee.io/api/v1/warranties?page=1&limit=10" \\
  -H "x-api-key: YOUR\_SERVER\_INTEGRATION\_TOKEN"

pages.description: Review Warrantee's security, privacy, tenant isolation, API token, document handling, OCR, payment, and production monitoring controls for warranty operations.
pages.markdown:
---
title: "Warrantee Security & Trust — Enterprise Warranty Platform Controls"
description: "Review Warrantee's security, privacy, tenant isolation, API token, document handling, OCR, payment, and production monitoring controls for warranty operations."
canonical: "https://warrantee.io/en/security"
language: "en"
content_location: "https://warrantee.io/agent-markdown/en/security.md"
---

Security and trust

# Controls for sensitive warranty operations.

Warrantee handles warranties, claims, documents, integrations, and payments. The platform is designed around isolation, auditability, and minimizing data exposure.

CI

Required

Production gates

Active

External pentest

Execution-ready

## Authentication and session boundaries

Account and dashboard pages are protected routes, with password recovery and session refresh kept inside controlled flows.

## User and tenant isolation

Warranty, claim, and document access is scoped around owner and team boundaries, with production RLS probes in the release gate.

## Scoped API integration tokens

API / CLI / MCP integrations use integration tokens instead of usernames and passwords, with scopes and rate limits.

## Document and OCR safety

Files pass extension, MIME, and PDF-risk checks, while OCR corpus gates protect extraction changes from regressions.

## Payment integrity

Stripe relies on signed webhooks and production readiness checks to prevent untrusted payment-state changes.

## Production monitoring

Changes pass CI and Production Security Gates covering smoke, RLS, operational readiness, E2E, and controlled load checks.

## Clear operating commitments

This page explains current controls, not a third-party compliance certification. It should be updated after the external pentest report.

We do not ask integrators to share user passwords.

Private account and warranty pages are excluded from the sitemap.

A page load or screenshot alone is not treated as release proof.

Enterprise expansion should include an external penetration test before larger rollouts.

---
title: "Terms of Service — Warrantee"
description: "Read Warrantee's terms of service governing the use of our warranty management platform."
canonical: "https://warrantee.io/en/terms"
language: "en"
content_location: "https://warrantee.io/agent-markdown/en/terms.md"
---

[← Back to Home](https://warrantee.io/en)

# Terms of Service

Last updated: March 2026

## 1\. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing and using Warrantee, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our platform.

## 2\. Description of Service

Warrantee provides a digital warranty management platform that allows users to register, track, and manage product warranties. Our services include warranty registration, expiry notifications, claims management, and seller integration.

## 3\. User Accounts

You must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities under your account.

## 4\. User Responsibilities

Users are responsible for the accuracy of warranty information they submit. Warrantee is not liable for any losses resulting from inaccurate or incomplete warranty data provided by users.

## 5\. Intellectual Property

All content, features, and functionality of the Warrantee platform are owned by Warrantee and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

## 6\. Limitation of Liability

Warrantee shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of or inability to use the service.

## 7\. Governing Law

These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

## 8\. Contact

For questions about these Terms, please contact us at hello@warrantee.io

pages.markdown:
---
title: "Privacy Policy — Warrantee"
description: "Learn how Warrantee collects, uses, and protects your personal data and privacy."
canonical: "https://warrantee.io/en/privacy"
language: "en"
content_location: "https://warrantee.io/agent-markdown/en/privacy.md"
---

[← Back to Home](https://warrantee.io/en)

# Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 2026

## 1\. Information We Collect

We collect information you provide directly, including your name, email address, and warranty details. We also collect usage data such as device information, IP address, and browsing patterns to improve our services.

## 2\. How We Use Your Information

We use your information to provide and maintain the Warrantee service, send warranty expiry notifications, process claims, improve our platform, and communicate with you about service updates.

## 3\. Data Storage and Security

Your data is stored securely using industry-standard encryption. We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, or destruction.

## 4\. Data Sharing

We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with sellers when you initiate a warranty claim, and with service providers who assist in operating our platform, subject to confidentiality agreements.

## 5\. Your Rights

You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You may request a copy of your data or ask us to stop processing it. Contact us at hello@warrantee.io to exercise these rights.

## 6\. Cookies and Tracking

We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience, analyze usage, and assist in our marketing efforts. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.

## 7\. Data Retention

We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. Warranty records are kept for the duration of the warranty period plus an additional 2 years.

## 8\. Contact Us

For privacy-related inquiries, contact our Data Protection Officer at hello@warrantee.io

[Back](https://warrantee.io/en)

# Cookie Policy

Last updated: March 24, 2026

## What Are Cookies?

Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit our website. We use them to improve your experience and understand how our site is used.

## Types of Cookies We Use

Necessary: Required for the website to function properly, such as login and security. Analytics: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website. Marketing: Used to deliver relevant advertisements.

## Saudi PDPL Compliance

In compliance with Saudi Arabia's Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL), we obtain your consent before using non-essential cookies. You can manage your preferences at any time through our cookie consent banner.

## Contact Us

If you have any questions about our cookie policy, please contact us at hello@warrantee.io

title: "Warranty Management Software for Businesses | Warrantee.io"
description: "Learn how warranty management software helps teams register warranties, track expiry, manage claims, issue certificates, and keep audit-ready records."
canonical: "https://warrantee.io/en/resources/warranty-management-software"
language: "en"
content_location: "https://warrantee.io/agent-markdown/en/resources/warranty-management-software.md"
---

Warranty management software

# Warranty Management Software for Businesses

Warranty management software replaces scattered spreadsheets, inboxes, and manual follow-ups with one operating record for every warranty. Warrantee.io is built for sellers and businesses that need bilingual certificates, approval history, expiry reminders, claims workflows, and public verification.

Best for retailers, distributors, ecommerce operators, service teams, and businesses that issue or manage product warranties at scale.

[Start free](https://warrantee.io/en/auth?tab=signup)[Contact us](https://warrantee.io/en/contact)

Bilingual Arabic and English workflows.

Public warranty verification and certificate paths.

API / CLI / MCP-ready architecture for registered business users.

Decision point

## What it should centralize

A real warranty system should keep the commercial record, customer record, product record, coverage terms, documents, status, and activity history together.

-   Product, serial number, seller, buyer, purchase date, and coverage period.
-   Receipts, warranty cards, photos, and generated certificates.
-   Approval, rejection, claim, transfer, and extension history.

Decision point

## Why teams move beyond spreadsheets

Spreadsheets can list warranties, but they do not enforce ownership, permissions, reminders, evidence, or customer-facing verification. That gap becomes expensive when claims, disputes, or audits start.

-   No reliable public verification page for buyers or service teams.
-   No consistent audit trail when a warranty changes status.
-   No controlled API / CLI / MCP path for ERP, ecommerce, support systems, scripts, or agents.

## Start with a controlled warranty workflow

Create a free account or speak with the Warrantee team about seller and API / CLI / MCP workflows.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is warranty management software?

Warranty management software is a system for creating, tracking, verifying, extending, and resolving warranties with evidence and workflow controls.

### Who uses Warrantee.io?

Warrantee.io is built for businesses, sellers, distributors, and service teams that need warranty records to stay reliable after the sale.

pages.description: A practical guide to warranty claims management: evidence, claim intake, seller review, decisions, status tracking, and customer communication.
pages.markdown:
---
title: "Warranty Claims Management | Warrantee.io"
description: "A practical guide to warranty claims management: evidence, claim intake, seller review, decisions, status tracking, and customer communication."
canonical: "https://warrantee.io/en/resources/warranty-claims-management"
language: "en"
content_location: "https://warrantee.io/agent-markdown/en/resources/warranty-claims-management.md"
---

Claims workflow

# Warranty Claims Management

Warranty claims fail when proof is scattered, responsibilities are unclear, and decisions happen outside the system. A reliable claims workflow connects the warranty record, documents, customer notes, seller review, and final decision.

Best for service teams, sellers, support operations, and companies that need fewer blind disputes.

[Create account](https://warrantee.io/en/auth?tab=signup)[Contact us](https://warrantee.io/en/contact)

Claim pages connect to warranty records.

Documents stay attached to the decision.

Status tracking reduces customer uncertainty.

Decision point

## Claim intake

The claim should start from a verified warranty so product data, coverage dates, customer details, and documents are already attached.

-   Issue description
-   Evidence attachments
-   Warranty status and coverage check

Decision point

## Decision record

Approvals, rejections, and follow-ups need a visible decision trail. That protects the seller and gives the buyer a clearer answer.

-   Decision owner
-   Reason and timestamp
-   Customer-visible status

## Bring claims back to the warranty record

Use Warrantee to keep claims, evidence, and decisions connected.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What makes warranty claims easier to resolve?

Clear evidence, verified warranty data, defined ownership, and visible status history make claims easier to resolve.

pages.description: How digital warranty certificates improve proof, verification, QR access, bilingual support, and customer trust after purchase.
pages.markdown:
---
title: "Digital Warranty Certificates | Warrantee.io"
description: "How digital warranty certificates improve proof, verification, QR access, bilingual support, and customer trust after purchase."
canonical: "https://warrantee.io/en/resources/digital-warranty-certificates"
language: "en"
content_location: "https://warrantee.io/agent-markdown/en/resources/digital-warranty-certificates.md"
---

Certificates and proof

# Digital Warranty Certificates

A digital warranty certificate should be more than a PDF. It should connect the buyer to a live verification record, coverage terms, product details, seller identity, and claim path.

Best for sellers that want every issued warranty to become a trusted post-purchase touchpoint.

[Start issuing](https://warrantee.io/en/auth?tab=signup)[Contact us](https://warrantee.io/en/contact)

Bilingual certificate generation.

Public verification route.

QR-friendly warranty passport flow.

Decision point

## What certificates should include

The certificate should clearly show the product, customer, warranty term, reference number, and verification link.

-   Reference number
-   QR verification path
-   Coverage terms in Arabic and English

Decision point

## Why live verification matters

Static PDFs can be copied or separated from the current warranty status. A live passport-style page can show whether the warranty is active, claimed, transferred, or expired.

-   Reduces counterfeit proof
-   Improves service desk confidence
-   Creates a direct claim and extension path

## Issue certificates buyers can verify

Create bilingual warranty certificates with live verification paths.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Can a digital warranty certificate replace a paper card?

For many operational workflows, yes. The certificate should still preserve the terms, proof, seller identity, and verification path required by the business.

---
title: "ERP Warranty API / CLI / MCP Integration | Warrantee.io"
description: "How ERP, ecommerce, scripts, and agents can connect to warranty workflows using scoped integration tokens, verified users, and controlled rate limits."
canonical: "https://warrantee.io/en/resources/erp-warranty-api-integration"
language: "en"
content_location: "https://warrantee.io/agent-markdown/en/resources/erp-warranty-api-integration.md"
---

API / CLI / MCP and systems integration

# ERP Warranty API / CLI / MCP Integration

Warranty data often starts in ERP, ecommerce, POS, or service systems. An integration-ready platform lets registered business users create and verify warranties without opening broad public access.

Best for operations teams connecting ecommerce checkout, ERP item records, support desks, or seller portals.

[View API / CLI / MCP guide](https://warrantee.io/en/api-docs)[Contact us](https://warrantee.io/en/contact)

Public API / CLI / MCP documentation is indexed.

API routes require authentication.

Integration tokens are part of production smoke checks.

Decision point

## Access should be scoped

Business API / CLI / MCP access should require registered users, scoped tokens, ownership checks, and rate limits. That protects customer records and prevents integrations from seeing another company's data.

-   Authenticated integration tokens
-   Company-level ownership checks
-   Peak and abuse rate limits

Decision point

## Useful integration events

The most valuable flows are warranty creation after purchase, warranty verification for service teams, claim intake, certificate generation, and status sync.

-   Create warranty after order fulfillment
-   Verify warranty at service desk
-   Sync claim and extension status

## Connect warranty workflows to your systems

Review the API / CLI / MCP guide or contact Warrantee for integration planning.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Can customers use Warrantee API / CLI / MCP directly?

API / CLI / MCP access should be limited to registered business users and integration tokens with company-level authorization.

---
title: "Saudi and GCC Warranty Operations | Warrantee.io"

language: "en"

---

Saudi and GCC operations

# Saudi and GCC Warranty Operations

Warranty operations in Saudi Arabia and the GCC need clear proof, Arabic and English communication, seller accountability, and customer-facing verification. Warrantee.io is positioned around that post-purchase trust problem.

Best for GCC retailers, distributors, service providers, ecommerce operators, and businesses issuing warranties to Arabic and English audiences.

[Start free](https://warrantee.io/en/auth?tab=signup)[Contact us](https://warrantee.io/en/contact)

Arabic is fully indexed.

English remains the primary source.

GCC-focused metadata and schema are in place.

Decision point

## Bilingual trust

Warranty terms should be understandable to the buyer and usable by internal teams. Bilingual records reduce ambiguity when claims move between customer support, sellers, and management.

-   Arabic and English certificates
-   Arabic and English public pages
-   Locale-preserving account and verification flows

Decision point

## Operational accountability

A warranty platform should show who issued the warranty, who approved it, what changed, and what the customer can verify.

-   Seller registration
-   Approval history
-   Customer verification and certificates

## Run warranties in Arabic and English

Use Warrantee for regional seller workflows, certificates, and verification.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Is Warrantee only for Saudi Arabia?

Warrantee.io is focused on Saudi Arabia and the GCC, with English and Arabic workflows designed for regional warranty operations.

pages.description: How public warranty verification and product-passport records help buyers, sellers, and service teams trust warranty status without exposing private account data.
pages.markdown:
---
title: "Product Passport and Warranty Verification | Warrantee.io"
description: "How public warranty verification and product-passport records help buyers, sellers, and service teams trust warranty status without exposing private account data."
canonical: "https://warrantee.io/en/resources/product-passport-warranty-verification"
language: "en"
content_location: "https://warrantee.io/agent-markdown/en/resources/product-passport-warranty-verification.md"
---

Public verification

# Product Passport and Warranty Verification

A warranty should not disappear into a private spreadsheet after purchase. A product-passport style verification page gives buyers and service teams a controlled public record for status, reference numbers, seller context, and next steps while keeping private documents and account data protected.

Best for sellers, distributors, ecommerce teams, service desks, and buyers who need fast proof that a warranty exists and is current.

[Verify a warranty](https://warrantee.io/en/auth?tab=signup)[Contact us](https://warrantee.io/en/contact)

Public verification is separate from private warranty records.

Protected account routes redirect unauthenticated users.

API and MCP private actions require scoped tokens.

Decision point

## What public verification should show

The public layer should answer the operational question without exposing the private record. It should confirm whether the warranty is recognized, whether it is active or expired, and which safe next step the user should take.

-   Reference or verification identifier
-   High-level product and warranty status
-   Safe claim, support, or certificate path

Decision point

## What must stay private

A verification page should not leak customer documents, private notes, account ownership, payment details, or internal approval evidence. Those belong behind authentication and tenant checks.

-   No private file URLs
-   No account dashboard access
-   No cross-tenant warranty details

## Give every warranty a trusted public check

Use Warrantee to separate public verification from private warranty operations.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Is a product passport the same as a warranty record?

Not exactly. The product passport is the safe public surface. The private warranty record can include documents, ownership, claims, approvals, and account-specific history.

pages.markdown:
---
title: "Warranty Extension Marketplace Readiness | Warrantee.io"
description: "What businesses need before offering warranty extensions: eligibility rules, payments, audit trails, claim history, underwriting signals, and customer trust."
canonical: "https://warrantee.io/en/resources/warranty-extension-marketplace"
language: "en"
content_location: "https://warrantee.io/agent-markdown/en/resources/warranty-extension-marketplace.md"
---

Warranty extensions

# Warranty Extension Marketplace Readiness

Warranty extensions can become a revenue line, but only if the original warranty record is reliable. Eligibility, product history, claim behavior, payment status, seller policy, and customer communication must be structured before extensions scale.

Best for sellers, retailers, distributors, and partners evaluating future extended warranty, underwriting, or insurance-like offerings.

[Explore pricing](https://warrantee.io/en/auth?tab=signup)[Contact us](https://warrantee.io/en/contact)

Stripe readiness and unsigned webhook rejection are production checked.

Extension pages and payment routes exist.

Warranty records carry structured status and dates.

Decision point

## Extension eligibility

A customer should not be offered an extension unless the warranty is valid, the product category is eligible, the timing is allowed, and prior claim behavior does not violate policy.

-   Active warranty and valid purchase date
-   Seller or category extension policy
-   Claim and fraud-risk checks

Decision point

## Payment and audit controls

Extensions require payment status, webhook verification, idempotency, customer-visible confirmation, and a clear audit trail showing what changed in coverage.

-   Verified checkout and webhook events
-   Coverage change history
-   Customer certificate or confirmation path

## Prepare warranties for extension revenue

Use structured warranty records before adding extension and partner workflows.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Can every warranty be extended?

No. Extension eligibility should depend on category, seller policy, coverage dates, claim history, payment status, and future underwriting rules.

pages.description: How warranty records can evolve into asset lifecycle intelligence for recalls, vendor reliability, product risk, claim patterns, and renewal opportunities.
pages.markdown:
---
title: "Recall and Asset Lifecycle Intelligence | Warrantee.io"
description: "How warranty records can evolve into asset lifecycle intelligence for recalls, vendor reliability, product risk, claim patterns, and renewal opportunities."
canonical: "https://warrantee.io/en/resources/recall-asset-lifecycle-intelligence"
language: "en"
content_location: "https://warrantee.io/agent-markdown/en/resources/recall-asset-lifecycle-intelligence.md"
---

Asset lifecycle intelligence

# Recall and Asset Lifecycle Intelligence

Warranty reminders are useful, but the strategic value is the asset intelligence created over time: what was purchased, from whom, when coverage ends, how often claims happen, which vendors cause friction, and where recalls or reliability issues may appear.

Best for enterprises, service operators, distributors, and future partners that need warranty data to support recall response, reliability analysis, and lifecycle planning.

[Explore features](https://warrantee.io/en/auth?tab=signup)[Contact us](https://warrantee.io/en/contact)

Warranty records, claims, documents, and seller flows are structured.

API / CLI / MCP routes support future system integration.

Public verification can remain separate from private lifecycle analysis.

Decision point

## Signals that matter

Lifecycle intelligence starts with clean operational signals. Product category, serial number, seller, coverage dates, claim reason, document quality, and resolution status all become useful when consistently captured.

-   Product and seller reliability
-   Claim frequency and reason patterns
-   Expiry, renewal, and extension opportunities

Decision point

## Recall readiness

Recall workflows need to identify affected products, notify owners, document action, and preserve proof. That is difficult when purchase and warranty records are fragmented.

-   Find affected asset groups
-   Notify account owners or customers
-   Track recall response and evidence

## Start with warranty data that can become intelligence

Create reliable warranty records now so lifecycle and reliability insights have a trustworthy foundation later.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Is Warrantee already a full asset management system?

Warrantee is focused on warranty operations today, with architecture and data signals that can support broader asset lifecycle intelligence over time.

## Public Structured Data

```json
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
```

pages.markdown:
---
title: "Warrantee vs Spreadsheets | Warrantee.io"
description: "Compare Warrantee with spreadsheet-based warranty tracking for proof, permissions, reminders, claims, certificates, and API / CLI / MCP integration."
canonical: "https://warrantee.io/en/compare/spreadsheets"
language: "en"
content_location: "https://warrantee.io/agent-markdown/en/compare/spreadsheets.md"
---

Comparison

# Warrantee vs Spreadsheets

Spreadsheets are useful for lists. Warranty operations need more than lists: permissions, evidence, reminders, public verification, certificates, customer workflows, and audit history.

For teams deciding whether to keep warranty tracking in Excel, Google Sheets, Airtable, or move to a controlled warranty platform.

[Start free](https://warrantee.io/en/auth?tab=signup)[Contact us](https://warrantee.io/en/contact)

Protected dashboards redirect unauthenticated users.

API routes reject unauthenticated access.

Public verification stays separate from private records.

Decision point

## Where spreadsheets break

The problem is not the table. The problem is that warranty work needs process control around the table.

-   No public verification page
-   No claim workflow
-   Weak permission and audit controls
-   No certificate generation path

Decision point

## Where Warrantee fits

Warrantee turns a warranty row into a managed lifecycle: issue, approve, verify, claim, extend, and report.

-   Structured records
-   Role-aware workflows
-   Bilingual certificates
-   API / CLI / MCP-ready integrations

## Move from rows to warranty operations

Use Warrantee when the warranty record needs workflow, proof, and customer trust.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Can a spreadsheet be enough?

A spreadsheet can be enough for a small private list. It becomes risky when customers, sellers, claims, documents, permissions, and integrations are involved.

pages.description: A practical comparison between building a custom AI-generated warranty tool and using Warrantee for production-ready warranty workflows.
pages.markdown:
---
title: "Why Not Build Warranty Software With AI? | Warrantee.io"
description: "A practical comparison between building a custom AI-generated warranty tool and using Warrantee for production-ready warranty workflows."
canonical: "https://warrantee.io/en/compare/build-with-ai"
language: "en"
content_location: "https://warrantee.io/agent-markdown/en/compare/build-with-ai.md"
---

Build vs buy

# Why Not Build Warranty Software With AI?

AI can help create a prototype quickly. The hard part is not drawing forms. The hard part is production warranty operations: authentication, company isolation, audit trails, claims, certificates, integration tokens, rate limits, payments, monitoring, and support.

For founders, operators, and technical buyers considering whether to build their own warranty tracker with AI tools.

[Start with Warrantee](https://warrantee.io/en/auth?tab=signup)[Contact us](https://warrantee.io/en/contact)

Production checks cover auth boundaries and protected APIs.

Stripe, OCR, and webhook readiness are monitored.

Public API / CLI / MCP documentation and verification flows already exist.

Decision point

## AI helps you start; it does not remove ownership

A generated app still needs someone to own security, data leaks, database constraints, RLS, billing, support, SEO, monitoring, migrations, backups, and incident response.

-   Authentication and company isolation
-   Claims and certificate integrity
-   Webhook, payment, and API / CLI / MCP security
-   Production monitoring and QA

Decision point

## When building is reasonable

Building your own can make sense if warranty workflow is your core product, you have an engineering team, and you are ready to maintain the system long-term.

-   You need full proprietary control
-   Your workflow is deeply unique
-   You can fund security, QA, and maintenance

Decision point

## When Warrantee is faster

Warrantee is the practical path when you need warranty operations now and want the AI-assisted custom work to focus on integrations, analytics, and sales workflows instead of rebuilding core infrastructure.

-   Use the platform for core warranty lifecycle
-   Use AI for workflows around the platform
-   Reduce launch and security risk

## Use AI where it gives leverage

Let Warrantee handle the warranty operating layer, then use AI to tailor reporting, integrations, and workflows.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Can AI build a warranty app?

AI can help build a prototype. A production warranty platform still needs security boundaries, data ownership, QA, integrations, monitoring, and support.

### Should I build or use Warrantee?

Build if warranty workflow is your proprietary core and you have long-term engineering ownership. Use Warrantee if you want a faster, safer operating layer.

description: "منصة إدارة الضمانات لتتبّع الضمانات والموافقة عليها وتمديدها وتقديم المطالبات من مكان واحد. باللغتين العربية والإنجليزية. خطة مجانية متاحة."
canonical: "https://warrantee.io/ar"
language: "ar"
content_location: "https://warrantee.io/agent-markdown/ar.md"
---

# ثق بالشروط. تتبع كل ضمان.

Warrantee هو منصة إدارة الضمانات المبنية للشركات. وافق على الضمانات وتابعها واطالب بها بثقة.

[ابدأ مجاناً](https://warrantee.io/ar/auth?tab=signup)[طلب عرض توضيحي](https://warrantee.io/ar#contact)

لا توجد حاجة لبطاقة ائتمان. خطة مجانية متاحة.

## الضمانات لا يجب أن تكون بهذه الصعوبة.

إدارة الضمانات عبر مؤسستك معقدة. تتبعها بوضوح وثقة.

### فقدان المواعيد

نسيان تواريخ انتهاء الصلاحية وفقدان التغطية عندما تحتاجها أكثر.

### الموافقات اليدوية

رسائل البريد الإلكتروني والجداول تبطئ فريقك.

### ادعاءات غير محققة

غياب مسارات التدقيق والتوثيق يؤدي إلى نزاعات.

### حواجز اللغة

إدارة الضمانات بالعربية والإنجليزية تتطلب تكاليف ترجمة.

## كل ما تحتاجه

جميع الأدوات التي تحتاجها لإدارة الضمانات بحجم كبير.

### سير عمل الموافقة الذكي

قم بتعيين قواعد موافقة مخصصة، وجهز الضمانات للفرق المناسبة، وأتمتة الموافقات متعددة المستوياج.

### تنبيهات انتهاء الصلاحية

لا تفوت موعد انتهاء الضمان. احصل على تنبيهات استباقية لانتهاء الصلاحية والتواريخ الحرجة.

### شهادات ثنائية اللغة

أنشئ شهادات ضمان احترافية باللغة العربية والإنجليزية. قابلة للتخصيص بالكامل مع علامتك التجارية.

### لوحة معلوماج فورية

اعرض جميع الضمانات في لمحة واحدة. تتبع الحالة وتواريخ انتهاء الصلاحية وسجل الادعاءات في مركز واحد.

### البريد الإلكتروني للضمان

أعد توجيه رسائل البريد الإلكتروني لإنشاء سجلات الضمان تلقائياً. يتم تضمين المستندات الداعمة على الفور.

### تتبع السلسلة

تتبع سلاسل الضمان والتحويلات. الحفاظ على مسارات تدقيق كاملة للملكية والموافقاج.

حلقة الثقة بعد الشراء

## حوّل كل ضمان إلى جواز منتج موثق.

يمسح العميل مرة واحدة للتحقق من الأصالة، فتح الشهادة، تقديم مطالبة، أو طلب تمديد. ويبقى البائع متصلاً بالعميل بعد البيع.

[ابدأ إصدار الضمانات](https://warrantee.io/ar/seller/register)[عرض API / CLI / MCP](https://warrantee.io/ar/api-docs)[عرض نموذج جواز المنتج](https://warrantee.io/ar/demo/product-passport)

### تحقق قابل للمسح

كل شهادة وصفحة ضمان تقود إلى سجل تحقق مباشر بدلاً من ملف ثابت.

### مسار المطالبات والتمديد

نفس جواز المنتج يوجّه العميل إلى المطالبات وطلبات التمديد مع السياق الصحيح.

### جاهز للتكامل عبر API / CLI / MCP

يمكن للمستخدمين المسجلين ربط ERP والمتاجر والدعم والسكريبتات والوكلاء عبر رموز تكامل محددة الصلاحيات ومحدودة الطلبات.

إثبات موثق وقت الخدمة

طلب التمديد يتحول إلى إشارة إيراد

فرق الدعم تقلل النزاعات غير الواضحة

إثبات تشغيلي

## مصمم للإثبات، وليس للتخزين فقط.

كل ضمان يحتاج إلى مالك وأدلة وشروط ومسار تحقق. يحافظ Warrantee على ترابط هذه العناصر من الإصدار إلى المطالبة.

### حدود أمنية

لوحات محمية ووصول مصادق عبر API / CLI / MCP وصلاحيات تراعي الشركة.

### سجلات قابلة للتدقيق

تبقى الموافقات والمطالبات والمستندات وتغيرات الحالة مرتبطة بالضمان.

### إثبات الشهادة

الشهادات الثنائية والتحقق عبر QR تساعد المشترين وفرق الخدمة على الثقة بالسجل.

### ضوابط API / CLI / MCP

رموز محددة وحدود طلبات وفحوص ملكية تحمي وصول التكامل.

## كيف يعمل Warrantee

ابدأ في دقائق مع سير عملنا البديهي.

1

### سجل شركتك

قم بالتسجيل وإعداد ملف الشركة الخاص بك في دقائق.

2

### إنشاء الضمانات

أضف الضمانات يدويًا أو عبر البريد الإلكتروني. إرفاق المستندات الأصلية تلقائيًا.

3

### الموافقة والتتبع

توجيه للموافقين، جمع التوقيعات، وتفعيل الضمانات.

4

### المراقبة والادعاء

تتبع الحالة في الوقت الفعلي ومعالجة الادعاءات مع التوثيق الكامل.

## لا تفقد التغطية أبداً مرة أخرى

مد الضمانات قبل انتهاء الصلاحية. يقدم البائعون التمديدات مباشرة عبر Warrantee.

-   شروط تمديد مرنة
-   عملية موافقة فورية
-   تسعير شفاف

البائع

عرض التمديد

المشتري

تغطية ممددة

## أسعار بسيطة وشفافة

ابدأ بالخطة المجانية. رقّ عندما تحتاج إلى عمق أكبر في سير العمل.

### مجاني

للأفراد الذين يبدأون

$0/ شهر

[ابدأ مجاناً](https://warrantee.io/ar/auth?tab=signup)

-   حتى 10 ضمانات
-   لوحة معلومات أساسية
-   دعم البريد الإلكتروني
-   مستخدم واحد
-   سجل ضمانات كامل

عرض إطلاق بالريال السعودي

### احترافي

عرض إطلاق بالريال للشركات النامية.

149 ر.س/ شهر

[ابدأ الاحترافي](https://warrantee.io/ar/auth?tab=signup)

-   ضمانات غير محدودة
-   لوحة معلومات متقدمة وتحليلات
-   دعم بريد ودردشة بأولوية
-   حتى 5 أعضاء فريق
-   سجل ضمانات كامل
-   سير عمل موافقة مخصص
-   شهادات ثنائية اللغة

### مؤسسي

للمؤسسات الكبيرة

مخصص

[اتصل بفريق المبيعات](https://warrantee.io/ar/auth?tab=signup)

-   كل ما في الاحترافي
-   أعضاء فريق غير محدودين
-   مدير حسابات مخصص
-   تكاملات مخصصة
-   أمان متقدم و SSO
-   سجل غير محدود
-   ضمان SLA
-   نسبة عمولة قابلة للتفاوض

## هل أنت مستعد لحماية ما يهم؟

ابدأ حسابك المجاني اليوم. لا توجد حاجة لبطاقة ائتمان.

[ابدأ الآن](https://warrantee.io/ar/auth?tab=signup)[hello@warrantee.io](mailto:hello@warrantee.io)

---
title: "عن وارنتي — قصتنا"
description: "تعرّف على كيف تغيّر وارنتي إدارة الضمانات للشركات في المملكة العربية السعودية ودول الخليج."
canonical: "https://warrantee.io/ar/about"
language: "ar"
content_location: "https://warrantee.io/agent-markdown/ar/about.md"
---

# قصتنا

كيف تحولت فاتورة ضمان منسية إلى مهمة لحماية كل عملية شراء تقوم بها.

## بدأت مع مكيف متعطل

في صيف 2024، تعطل مكيف مكتب المؤسس. كان عمره أقل من سنتين، أي ضمن فترة الضمان. لكن عند محاولة تقديم المطالبة، لم تكن الفاتورة موجودة، وكان بريد المورد مدفونا في محادثة قديمة. النتيجة: دفع 4,500 ريال من جيبه لإصلاح كان يفترض أن يكون مجانيا.

لم تكن تلك المرة الأولى. جهاز محمول تعطلت شاشته بعد انتهاء الضمان بأسبوعين فقط، وسخان مياه تعطّل بينما كان ضمان المركّب لا يزال ساريا، لكن لم يجد أحد المستندات.

> “أدركت أنني لست وحدي. كل شخص، وكل شركة، وكل مدير مرافق تحدثت معه كان يعاني من المشكلة نفسها. الضمانات موجودة لحمايتنا، لكننا لم نبن نظاما لإدارتها.”

## المهمة

تأسست Warrantee بمهمة بسيطة: ألا يخسر أحد ماله لأنه نسي ضمانا. بنينا منصة تفعل للضمانات ما يفعله البنك لأموالك: تجمع كل شيء في مكان واحد، وتذكرك عند الحاجة إلى التصرف، وتعطيك الأدوات اللازمة للتنفيذ.

## قيمنا

### الشفافية

يجب أن تكون شروط الضمان واضحة وسهلة الوصول والفهم. نحن نجعل التفاصيل الدقيقة مرئية.

### الثقة

ثق بالشروط ليست مجرد عبارة. كل ميزة نبنيها تخلق مساءلة أوضح بين المشتري والبائع.

### ثنائي اللغة من الأساس

العربية والإنجليزية لغتان أساسيتان في كل ميزة وكل شاشة.

### البساطة

إدارة الضمانات يجب ألا تحتاج إلى تدريب. إذا لم تكن واضحة، فنحن نواصل تحسينها.

## انضم إلينا

ابدأ حماية ضماناتك اليوم. التسجيل يستغرق 60 ثانية، وهو مجاني.

[ابدأ مجانا](https://warrantee.io/ar/auth?tab=signup)

language: "ar"
content_location: "https://warrantee.io/agent-markdown/ar/blog.md"
---

موارد وارنتي

# أدلة إدارة الضمانات للفرق التي تحتاج إلى إثبات وسرعة وثقة.

استخدم هذا المركز لفهم تتبع الضمانات وسير المطالبات وأدلة المستندات وانضمام البائعين وتشغيل الضمانات عبر API / CLI / MCP.

تشغيل الضمانات

## كيف تدير الضمانات بدون جداول مشتتة

نموذج عملي لنقل سجلات الضمان والفواتير والمطالبات وتذكيرات الانتهاء من البريد والجداول إلى نظام واحد قابل للتدقيق.

[اقرأ الدليل المرتبط](https://warrantee.io/ar/guide)

دليل الشراء

## ما الذي يجب البحث عنه في برنامج إدارة الضمانات

القدرات الأساسية للبائعين والمشترين: قراءة المستندات، سير الموافقات، تتبع المطالبات، شهادات ثنائية اللغة، تذكيرات، وتكاملات جاهزة عبر API / CLI / MCP.

[اقرأ الدليل المرتبط](https://warrantee.io/ar/features)

سير المطالبات

## إدارة مطالبات الضمان: من الإثبات إلى القرار

كيف تساعد الأدلة الواضحة ومصدر المستند وحالة البائع وسجل الموافقات في تقليل النزاعات وجعل قرارات الضمان أكثر موثوقية.

[اقرأ الدليل المرتبط](https://warrantee.io/ar/faq)

أدلة متخصصة

## مواضيع يبحث عنها المشترون والفرق قبل اختيار منصة ضمان.

### برنامج إدارة الضمانات للشركات

تعرّف على كيف يساعد برنامج إدارة الضمانات الفرق على تسجيل الضمانات وتتبع الانتهاء وإدارة المطالبات وإصدار الشهادات وحفظ السجلات القابلة للتدقيق.

[اقرأ الدليل](https://warrantee.io/ar/resources/warranty-management-software)

### إدارة مطالبات الضمان

دليل عملي لإدارة مطالبات الضمان: الأدلة واستقبال المطالبات ومراجعة البائع والقرارات وتتبع الحالة والتواصل مع العميل.

[اقرأ الدليل](https://warrantee.io/ar/resources/warranty-claims-management)

### شهادات الضمان الرقمية

كيف تحسن شهادات الضمان الرقمية الإثبات والتحقق والوصول عبر QR والدعم ثنائي اللغة وثقة العميل بعد الشراء.

[اقرأ الدليل](https://warrantee.io/ar/resources/digital-warranty-certificates)

### تكامل API / CLI / MCP للضمانات مع ERP

كيف يمكن لأنظمة ERP والتجارة الإلكترونية والسكريبتات والوكلاء الاتصال بسير الضمانات عبر رموز تكامل محددة ومستخدمين موثقين وحدود طلبات مضبوطة.

[اقرأ الدليل](https://warrantee.io/ar/resources/erp-warranty-api-integration)

### تشغيل الضمانات في السعودية والخليج

إرشادات تشغيل الضمانات للشركات في السعودية والخليج التي تحتاج إلى سجلات عربية وإنجليزية وسير بائعين وإثبات وثقة عملاء.

[اقرأ الدليل](https://warrantee.io/ar/resources/saudi-gcc-warranty-operations)

### جواز المنتج والتحقق من الضمان

كيف يساعد التحقق العام من الضمان وسجلات جواز المنتج المشترين والبائعين وفرق الخدمة على الثقة بحالة الضمان دون كشف بيانات الحساب الخاصة.

[اقرأ الدليل](https://warrantee.io/ar/resources/product-passport-warranty-verification)

### الاستعداد لسوق تمديد الضمان

ما الذي تحتاجه الشركات قبل تقديم تمديدات الضمان: قواعد الأهلية والمدفوعات وسجلات التدقيق وتاريخ المطالبات وإشارات الاكتتاب وثقة العميل.

[اقرأ الدليل](https://warrantee.io/ar/resources/warranty-extension-marketplace)

### الاستدعاءات وذكاء دورة حياة الأصول

كيف يمكن أن تتطور سجلات الضمان إلى ذكاء دورة حياة الأصول للاستدعاءات وموثوقية الموردين ومخاطر المنتجات وأنماط المطالبات وفرص التجديد.

[اقرأ الدليل](https://warrantee.io/ar/resources/recall-asset-lifecycle-intelligence)

مقارنات القرار

### Warrantee مقابل الجداول

قارن Warrantee بتتبع الضمانات عبر الجداول من حيث الإثبات والصلاحيات والتنبيهات والمطالبات والشهادات والتكامل.

[قارن الخيارات](https://warrantee.io/ar/compare/spreadsheets)

### لماذا لا تبني برنامج ضمان بالذكاء الاصطناعي؟

مقارنة عملية بين بناء أداة ضمان مخصصة بالذكاء الاصطناعي واستخدام Warrantee لسير ضمان جاهز للإنتاج.

[قارن الخيارات](https://warrantee.io/ar/compare/build-with-ai)

---
title: "مزايا وارنتي — أدوات ذكية لإدارة الضمان"
description: "استكشف سير عمل الموافقات وتذكيرات انتهاء الضمان والشهادات الثنائية اللغة ولوحة المتابعة الفورية في وارنتي."
canonical: "https://warrantee.io/ar/features"
language: "ar"
content_location: "https://warrantee.io/agent-markdown/ar/features.md"
---

# ميزات المنصة

كل ما تحتاجه لإدارة الضمانات بكفاءة للشركات والبائعين في السعودية ودول الخليج

### شهادات ضمان رقمية

إصدار شهادات ضمان احترافية مع رموز QR للتحقق.

### إدارة المطالبات

سير عمل مبسط للمطالبات من التقديم إلى الحل.

### تحليلات متقدمة

لوحات معلومات فورية مع مقاييس الأداء.

### تعاون الفريق

دعوة أعضاء الفريق مع صلاحيات مخصصة.

### دعم ثنائي اللغة

واجهة كاملة بالعربية والإنجليزية مع دعم RTL.

### استيعاب البريد

إنشاء ضمانات تلقائياً من البريد باستخدام الذكاء الاصطناعي.

### أمان مؤسسي

أمان على مستوى الصف وتشفير البيانات.

### تتبع الانتهاء

إشعارات تلقائية قبل انتهاء الضمان.

## ابدأ مجاناً اليوم

أنشئ حسابك المجاني وابدأ إدارة ضماناتك في دقائق

[ابدأ الآن](https://warrantee.io/ar/auth?tab=signup)

pages.description: ابدأ بالخطة المجانية دون بطاقة ائتمانية، أو انتقل إلى عرض الإطلاق للخطة الاحترافية مقابل 149 ريال شهريًا. أسعار المؤسسات مخصصة.
pages.markdown:
---
title: "أسعار وارنتي — خطط بسيطة وواضحة"
description: "ابدأ بالخطة المجانية دون بطاقة ائتمانية، أو انتقل إلى عرض الإطلاق للخطة الاحترافية مقابل 149 ريال شهريًا. أسعار المؤسسات مخصصة."
canonical: "https://warrantee.io/ar/pricing"
language: "ar"
content_location: "https://warrantee.io/agent-markdown/ar/pricing.md"
---

# اختر خطتك

ابدأ بالخطة المجانية دون بطاقة ائتمانية، أو فعّل عرض الإطلاق للاحترافي بالريال السعودي

الخطة المجانية تشمل حتى 10 ضمانات مع الاحتفاظ بالسجلات. التمديدات لها رسوم معاملات منفصلة عند الشراء.

### مجاني

للأفراد الذين يبدأون

مجاني

-   حتى 10 ضمانات
-   لوحة أساسية
-   دعم بريد
-   مستخدم واحد
-   سجل ضمانات كامل

الأكثر شعبية

### احترافي

للشركات النامية

ر.س 149 /شهر

عرض إطلاق

-   ضمانات غير محدودة
-   تحليلات متقدمة
-   دعم أولوية
-   حتى 5 أعضاء
-   سجل ضمانات كامل
-   سير عمل مخصص
-   شهادات ثنائية

### مؤسسي

للمؤسسات الكبيرة

تواصل معنا

-   كل ما في الاحترافي
-   أعضاء غير محدودين
-   مدير حساب مخصص
-   تكاملات مخصصة
-   ضمان SLA

وضوح التسعير

## لماذا الخطة الاحترافية بالريال السعودي؟

السعر الاحترافي عرض إطلاق واضح للعملاء الأوائل في السعودية والخليج. حدود الخطة المجانية محفوظة، ورسوم معاملات تمديد الضمان منفصلة عن مزايا الاشتراك حتى لا تختلط التكلفة بالفائدة.

### بدون بطاقة للخطة المجانية

ابدأ حتى 10 ضمانات بدون إدخال بطاقة.

### سعر واضح بالريال

الخطة الاحترافية موضحة قبل الدفع.

### جاهز للفرق

مناسب للبائعين وسير الموافقات والشهادات.

### جاهز للتكامل

دليل API / CLI / MCP متاح للمستخدمين التجاريين.

هل لديك أسئلة؟ [تواصل معنا](https://warrantee.io/ar/contact)

pages.description: اعثر على إجابات للأسئلة الشائعة حول منصة وارنتي لإدارة الضمانات.
pages.markdown:
---
title: "الأسئلة الشائعة — وارنتي"
description: "اعثر على إجابات للأسئلة الشائعة حول منصة وارنتي لإدارة الضمانات."
canonical: "https://warrantee.io/ar/faq"
language: "ar"
content_location: "https://warrantee.io/agent-markdown/ar/faq.md"
---

# الأسئلة الشائعة

إجابات على الأسئلة الأكثر شيوعًا حول Warrantee

<details>
<summary>ما هو Warrantee؟\\u25BC</summary>

Warrantee.io هو منصة إدارة الضمانات ثنائية اللغة للشركات والبائعين في السعودية ودول الخليج. تساعد على تتبع وتمديد وتوثيق وإدارة مطالبات الضمان رقميًا.
</details>

<details>
<summary>كم تكلفة Warrantee؟\\u25BC</summary>

يقدم Warrantee.io خطة مجانية بدون حاجة لبطاقة ائتمانية، وعرض إطلاق للخطة الاحترافية بقيمة 149 ريال شهريًا، وخطة مؤسسية بأسعار مخصصة. رسوم معاملات تمديد الضمان منفصلة.
</details>

<details>
<summary>هل Warrantee متاح بالعربية؟\\u25BC</summary>

نعم! Warrantee ثنائي اللغة بالكامل، يدعم الإنجليزية والعربية مع دعم كامل للتنسيق من اليمين إلى اليسار.
</details>

<details>
<summary>كيف أضيف ضمان؟\\u25BC</summary>

بعد التسجيل وتسجيل الدخول، انقر على 'إضافة ضمان' وأدخل تفاصيل المنتج ومعلومات المورد. يمكنك أيضًا إعادة توجيه رسائل الضمان عبر البريد الإلكتروني.
</details>

<details>
<summary>هل بياناتي آمنة؟\\u25BC</summary>

بالتأكيد. يستخدم Warrantee أمان مستوى الصف مع Supabase، وجميع الاتصالات مشفرة.
</details>

<details>
<summary>كيف أتواصل مع الدعم؟\\u25BC</summary>

قم بزيارة صفحة الاتصال أو راسلنا عبر support@warrantee.io.
</details>

لم تجد إجابتك؟

[تواصل معنا](https://warrantee.io/ar/contact)

pages.title: الأسئلة الشائعة — وارنتي

pages.description: دليل خطوة بخطوة لاستخدام وارنتي: أنشئ حسابك وابدأ الضمانات وأدِر الموافقات بسهولة.
pages.markdown:
---
title: "دليل استخدام وارنتي — البداية"
description: "دليل خطوة بخطوة لاستخدام وارنتي: أنشئ حسابك وابدأ الضمانات وأدِر الموافقات بسهولة."
canonical: "https://warrantee.io/ar/guide"
language: "ar"
content_location: "https://warrantee.io/agent-markdown/ar/guide.md"
---

# دليل الاستخدام

تعلم كيف تدير ضماناتك بفعالية في 4 خطوات بسيطة

الخطوة 1

### أضف ضمانك الأول

ارفع صورة أو أدخل التفاصيل يدوياً. المسح الذكي يملأ الحقول تلقائياً.

الخطوة 2

### تتبع الحالة

راقب حالة الضمانات النشطة والمنتهية والتي ستنتهي.

الخطوة 3

### احصل على تنبيهات

استلم تنبيهات قبل انتهاء الضمان حتى لا تفوتك.

الخطوة 4

### قدم مطالبة

قدم مطالبة ضمان بضغطة واحدة وتابع التقدم.

## الأسئلة الشائعة

<details>
<summary>كيف أضيف ضماناً جديداً؟</summary>

اذهب إلى الضمانات > جديد وارفع صورة أو أدخل التفاصيل يدوياً.
</details>

<details>
<summary>ما هو المسح الذكي؟</summary>

تقنية OCR تقرأ الإيصالات ووثائق الضمان وتستخرج التفاصيل تلقائياً.
</details>

<details>
<summary>كيف أقدم مطالبة ضمان؟</summary>

افتح الضمان > انقر تقديم مطالبة > صف المشكلة وأرفق الصور.
</details>

<details>
<summary>هل يمكنني مشاركة الضمان؟</summary>

نعم، يمكنك مشاركة شهادة الضمان عبر رابط أو تنزيل PDF.
</details>

## جاهز للبدء؟

أضف ضمانك الأول الآن وابدأ في حماية مشترياتك

أضف ضمان

pages.title: دليل استخدام وارنتي — البداية

pages.description: ادمج وارنتي مع ERP والمتاجر والسكريبتات والوكلاء والأنظمة الداخلية باستخدام واجهات الضمان وMCP ورموز التكامل الخادمية.
pages.markdown:
---
title: "دليل API / CLI / MCP وارنتي — تكاملات ERP والأنظمة"
description: "ادمج وارنتي مع ERP والمتاجر والسكريبتات والوكلاء والأنظمة الداخلية باستخدام واجهات الضمان وMCP ورموز التكامل الخادمية."
canonical: "https://warrantee.io/ar/api-docs"
language: "ar"
content_location: "https://warrantee.io/agent-markdown/ar/api-docs.md"
---

[العودة إلى الرئيسية](https://warrantee.io/ar)

# دليل API / CLI / MCP

اربط Warrantee مع ERP والمتاجر والسكريبتات والأنظمة الداخلية والوكلاء

[سجل الدخول لإنشاء مفتاح](https://warrantee.io/ar/auth?redirect=%2Far%2Fsettings%3Fsection%3Dintegrations)[انضم كبائع](https://warrantee.io/ar/seller/register)

### دليل التكامل الكامل

كل تكامل إنتاجي يبدأ من حساب Warrantee مسجل. أنشئ رمزاً محدود الصلاحيات من الإعدادات، احفظه كسِر، ثم استخدمه مع REST API أو السكريبتات أو الوكلاء المتوافقين مع MCP.

1.  1سجل الدخول أو أنشئ حساب Warrantee.
2.  2افتح الإعدادات ثم API / CLI / MCP.
3.  3أنشئ رمز تكامل محدد الصلاحيات وانسخه مرة واحدة.
4.  4احفظه في مدير أسرار أو متغير بيئة.
5.  5استخدم الرمز كـ x-api-key لطلبات API أو CLI أو الوكلاء.
6.  6راقب الاستخدام ودوّر المفاتيح وألغ الرموز غير المستخدمة.

### الرابط الأساسي

`https://warrantee.io/api/v1`

### المصادقة

الوصول للواجهة محصور بمستخدمي Warrantee المسجلين. لتكاملات ERP أو المتاجر أو الخوادم، لا تحفظ اسم مستخدم Warrantee أو كلمة مروره في النظام الخارجي. سجل الدخول مرة واحدة في Warrantee، أنشئ رمز تكامل مخصص، ثم أرسل هذا الرمز كـ x-api-key.

لا مشاركة لأسماء المستخدمين أو كلمات المرور

يسجل مسؤول التكامل الدخول إلى Warrantee فقط لإنشاء رموز التكامل أو عرضها أو إلغائها أو تدويرها. لا تستخدم بريد الدخول أو كلمة مرورك في تكاملات API أو CLI أو MCP. يجب أن يحفظ النظام المتصل رمز التكامل فقط، ويمكن تحديد صلاحياته وحدود طلباته وتاريخ انتهائه وإلغائه.

الموصى به لتكاملات الخوادم

`x-api-key: YOUR_SERVER_INTEGRATION_TOKEN`

جلسات التطبيق المسجلة

`Authorization: Bearer YOUR_SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN`

حدود الطلبات: 100 طلب في الدقيقة لكل مستخدم مسجل أو رمز تكامل، مع حدود إضافية على IP لمنع الإساءة.

### نموذج الأمان

كل طلب ضمان يتطلب مصادقة، ويقتصر على سجلات المالك أو البائع أو المصدر للمستخدم المحدد، مع حدود طلبات ورؤوس no-store.

تتضمن الاستجابات X-RateLimit-Limit و X-RateLimit-Remaining و X-RateLimit-Reset و Cache-Control: no-store و Vary: Authorization, x-api-key.

### رموز التكامل

أنشئ حتى 20 رمزاً نشطاً من جلسة مسجلة. يظهر السر مرة واحدة، ويتم حفظ الهاش فقط، مع صلاحيات قراءة/كتابة وتاريخ انتهاء وإلغاء.

إنشاء رمز

`POST /api/integration-tokens`

إلغاء رمز

`DELETE /api/integration-tokens/:id`

`{ "name": "ERP production", "scopes": ["warranties:read", "warranties:write", "claims:read", "documents:read"], "rate_limit_per_minute": 100 }`

الصلاحيات: warranties:read لقراءة الضمانات، و warranties:write للإنشاء والتحديث والحذف، و claims:read لقراءة المطالبات، و documents:read لقراءة بيانات المستندات بدون روابط الملفات الخاصة.

### ملاحظات التكامل

استخدم Idempotency-Key مع طلبات الإنشاء، وحافظ على رقم مرجعي ثابت متى أمكن، واستخدم رموز تكامل محددة الصلاحيات لمزامنة ERP. لا تطلب من العميل إرسال كلمة مرور Warrantee إلى شريك تكامل.

`Idempotency-Key: 8f5d07d0-erp-order-102044`

### CLI والسكريبتات

استخدم CLI الرسمي لوارنتي في السكريبتات ووظائف ERP ومزامنة المتاجر ومهام CI. داخل هذا المستودع يعمل عبر npm scripts، وبعد تثبيت الحزمة أو npm link يمكن تشغيله كأمر warrantee. الرمز يتبع المستخدم المسجل ولا يتطلب حفظ اسم مستخدم أو كلمة مرور.

متغير البيئة الموصى به

`export WARRANTEE_API_KEY="wrt_..."`

npm run warrantee:cli -- auth status
./tools/warrantee/cli.mjs auth status
warrantee auth status
npm run warrantee:cli -- warranties list --status active --pretty
npm run warrantee:cli -- claims list --status pending --pretty
npm run warrantee:cli -- documents list --query receipt --pretty
npm run warrantee:cli -- warranties create \\
  --product-name "Laptop" \\
  --start-date 2026-01-01 \\
  --end-date 2027-01-01 \\
  --idempotency-key erp-order-102044
npm run warrantee:cli -- verify WR-12345

### MCP واستخدام الوكلاء

شغّل خادم MCP لوارنتي عبر stdio أو استخدم نقطة MCP المستضافة على /api/mcp حتى يستطيع الوكلاء عرض الضمانات وإنشاءها وتحديثها وحذفها والتحقق منها، وعرض المطالبات، وقراءة بيانات المستندات عبر نفس مفتاح API المحدد الصلاحيات. داخل هذا المستودع استخدم npm run warrantee:mcp، وبعد تثبيت الحزمة أو npm link استخدم warrantee-mcp. يجب احترام الصلاحيات وحدود الطلبات وحدود الملكية وعدم طلب كلمات المرور.

{
  "mcpServers": {
    "warrantee": {
      "command": "npm",
      "args": \[
        "run",
        "warrantee:mcp",
        "--"
      \],
      "env": {
        "WARRANTEE\_API\_KEY": "wrt\_..."
      }
    },
    "warrantee-installed": {
      "command": "warrantee-mcp",
      "env": {
        "WARRANTEE\_API\_KEY": "wrt\_..."
      }
    }
  }
}

curl -X POST "https://warrantee.io/api/mcp" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -H "x-api-key: YOUR\_SERVER\_INTEGRATION\_TOKEN" \\
  -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/list","params":{}}'

قواعد الوكلاء

استخدم /llms.txt و /.well-known/agent-card.json و /.well-known/mcp.json و /.well-known/api-catalog و /api/mcp لاكتشاف MCP المستضاف. استخدم صفحة التحقق العامة للفحوص العامة. استخدم x-api-key فقط لبيانات الحساب المصادق عليها.

### نقاط الوصول

GET`/api/v1/warranties`قائمة الضمانات

المعلمات: `page, limit, status, category`

POST`/api/v1/warranties`إنشاء ضمان

المعلمات: `product_name*, start_date*, end_date*, description, serial_number, category, supplier, seller_name, seller_email`

GET`/api/v1/warranties/:id`عرض ضمان

المعلمات: `id (path)`

PUT`/api/v1/warranties/:id`تحديث ضمان

المعلمات: `product_name, start_date, end_date, status, category, supplier`

DELETE`/api/v1/warranties/:id`حذف ضمان

المعلمات: `id (path)`

GET`/api/v1/claims`عرض المطالبات

المعلمات: `page, limit, status, warranty_id`

GET`/api/v1/claims/:id`عرض مطالبة

المعلمات: `id (path)`

GET`/api/v1/documents`عرض بيانات المستندات

المعلمات: `page, limit, warranty_id, q`

GET`/api/v1/documents/:id`عرض بيانات مستند

المعلمات: `id (path)`

#### Example Request

curl -X GET "https://warrantee.io/api/v1/warranties?page=1&limit=10" \\
  -H "x-api-key: YOUR\_SERVER\_INTEGRATION\_TOKEN"
